data.title: Warsh expected to be named Fed chair by Trump on Friday. Known to favor Bitcoin as a monitoring tool for fiscal policy.
data.description: Kevin Warsh, who is considered a potential Federal Reserve chair due to his hawkish views, has previously stated that Bitcoin has the potential to act as a form of accountability for fiscal policy choices.

data.title: Galderma reveals global survey findings on menopause's impact on skin at IMCAS 2026; 50% women learn skin effects through experience in their 40s.
data.description: In Zug, Switzerland, Galderma (SIX: GALD) presented results from a worldwide study involving peri- and post-menopausal women from nine nations at the International Master Course on Aging Science (IMCAS) 2026 World Congress in Paris, France, held from January 29-31, 2026. The survey highlighted that more than 50% of women became aware of the skin effects of menopause through personal experience, with the majority discovering these changes during their 40s.

data.title: Circle plans to boost stablecoin adoption by enhancing infrastructure; targets scaling payments network and blockchain by 2026.
data.description: In 2026, Circle has highlighted plans to prioritize scaling its payments network and blockchain services for institutions. This comes as businesses explore the potential applications of stablecoins.

data.title: Analyst believes one entity keeping Bitcoin under $90K, warns of potential drop to "Bearadise." #BTC #cryptocurrency
data.description: According to order-book analysis of Bitcoin, the price of BTC appeared to be negatively impacted by the actions of a single trading entity. This situation has the potential to lead to a significant drop in value, possibly sending Bitcoin into a bear market.

data.title: Idorsia to present lucerastat data from 42-month treatment and kidney biopsy results at WORLD Symposium.
data.description: Idorsia Ltd, a pharmaceutical company based in Allschwil, Switzerland, has revealed that they will be sharing the findings of their lucerastat treatment conducted over a period of 42 months and the results of kidney biopsy data at the upcoming 22nd Annual WORLD Symposium™. The symposium is scheduled to occur from February 2 to February 6, 2026. Investors can track the company's performance on the Swiss Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol SIX: IDIA.
Company sees EUR 5.8B in 2025 sales with 8.9% profit margin and EUR 440M free cash flow.

data.title: Keio Plaza Hotel Tokyo hosts "25th Hinamatsuri Doll Festival" with 5,000 hanging art ornaments; unfolds live performances and cultural events until March 31, 2026.
data.description: A vibrant festival showcasing live painting performances, interactive workshops, "Koto" Japanese zither music, and a plethora of cultural events will run from February 1 to March 31, 2026, in Tokyo. Hosted by Keio Plaza Hotel Co., Ltd., the "Hinamatsuri Doll Festival" promises a unique blend of artistic experiences and traditional Japanese entertainment. This exciting event will span 59 days, offering visitors an opportunity to immerse themselves in the rich cultural tapestry of Japan.
